goal: As a base employee, attempt to open another employee's payslip by its hash id. The system must deny access (403).
verified_live: 2026-06-23: GET /api/v1/payrolls/{otherEmployeeHash} and /payslip both returned 403. authorizePayroll() guard works.
notes: Target hash comes from the admin-visible payroll list (a different employee_id than P_EMP).
